description: Frozen 5-ticket stratification panel for wp-trac-ticket CLI evaluation. Each round adds 5 fresh random open-or-closed Trac tickets to make a panel of 10.

fixed_panel.note: Open defect, ~3 RSS items, no PRs, no attachments. Tests minimal-content path.
Open enhancement, ~21 RSS items, 3 attachments, 1 PR. Tests scaling and section interaction.
Closed (fixed) Editor defect, 2 changesets via In-[N] auto-comments. Tests changeset extraction and resolution surfacing.
Closed via two changesets after a reopen, description contains a [[Image(URL)]] wiki macro. Tests image-macro conversion and status churn across multiple closing commits.
Assigned ticket with recent activity. Tests in-progress-ticket rendering.
